PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } else { "No listener on 5174" })
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK AI main.py'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=list\(d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\)\); cl=[p for p in paths if 'cover' in p.lower\(\)]; print\('cover-letter routes registered on local backend:', cl if cl else 'NONE — backend needs restart'\)")
PowerShell(docker exec resumeai-db psql -U postgres -d resume_ai -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec resumeai-db psql -U postgres -d resume_ai -c "\\d users" 2>&1)

PowerShell($body = '{"credential":"test-invalid-token-for-debug"}'; $response = $null; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8010/auth/google" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $err = $_.Exception; if \($err.Response\) { $stream = $err.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $err.Message } })
